She emphasized his realistic portrayal of village life and ordinary people, stating his authentic storytelling continues to inspire generations. Agarwal highlighted how his films connected audiences to their roots and culture, leaving an indelible mark on the industry.

title: Cost of conflict: US inflation hits 3-year high as Iran war fuels energy shock
description: US inflation hit a three-year high in May, soaring to 4.2% due to surging energy prices, particularly gasoline, driven by Middle East supply disruptions. This rise, the third consecutive monthly increase, pressures the Federal Reserve and poses a political challenge for the Trump administration ahead of midterm elections. Core inflation showed mixed signals, while energy costs are expected to cool.

Despite her valiant effort, India fell short by five runs, finishing on 166 in pursuit of England's 171. Ghosh's aggressive innings, featuring nine fours and two sixes, was the highlight for India.

title: Thane cabbie assaults elderly man after he objects to spitting on road; Shinde takes action

The PLA emphasizes the need for safeguards to prevent tactical errors and erosion of human judgment, advocating for rigorous testing and oversight of AI in decision-making.

title: FIFA World Cup: How to watch opening ceremony, all performers, start timings & more
description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony will feature three major celebrations across Mexico, Canada, and the United States, making it one of the biggest tournament launches in history. Artists including Shakira, Burna Boy, J Balvin, Tyla, Michael Bublé, and Nora Fatehi are set to perform. Fans in India can watch the ceremonies live on Unite8 Sports channels and Zee5. FIFA president Gianni Infantino called the event “a truly global celebration” uniting music, culture, and football.

title: Watch: PM Modi enjoys jhalmuri at NDA meeting served by Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi shared a video of himself enjoying Jhalmuri with fellow NDA leaders at a meeting in New Delhi. The popular Bengali snack, previously used as a political symbol by the BJP, was served by the West Bengal chief minister. The meeting coincided with PM Modi becoming India's longest-serving elected Prime Minister.

title: A Prime Minister, a thought leader

description: Alex Pereira is just days away from one of the biggest fights of his UFC career. The former two-division champion will face Ciryl Gane for the interim heavyweight title at UFC Freedom 250. The event, which will take place at the White House, has generated huge attention from MMA fans around the world. A victory would make Pereira a champion in a third UFC weight class and further strengthen his legacy as one of the sport’s most accomplished fighters.

Heated moment! Rana angers Inglis during 1st ODI - Watch
description: Nahid Rana starred as Bangladesh defeated Australia Cricket Team by 86 runs (DLS) in the first ODI. Rana took 4/41 and was involved in a brief on-field exchange with Australian captain Josh Inglis after dismissing him. Earlier, Mosaddek Hossain scored an unbeaten 86 as Bangladesh posted 284/8 to take a 1-0 series lead.

Bill Gates warns Microsoft, Amazon, Google on data center push
description: Bill Gates has told the AI industry it does not have permission to drive up household electricity bills, warning Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft that the old utility-funded grid model is finished. Speaking on CNBC, the Microsoft co-founder said hyperscalers must now pick data centre sites where the economics and politics hold. With 48 projects worth $156 billion already blocked in 2025 and public opposition at record highs, the buildout is colliding with sentiment.

title: EU orders Meta to give OpenAI and other AI rivals free access to WhatsApp
description: EU antitrust regulators have ordered Meta to grant rival AI companies free access to WhatsApp's business API. This decision comes amid an investigation into claims that Meta unfairly favored its own AI assistant. The order aims to ensure fair competition in the rapidly evolving AI market, with Meta facing potential fines if found in breach of rules.

title: 'Most terrifying 48 hours': 3-year-old swallows metal pins baked into birthday cake
description: A toddler's third birthday celebration turned into a nightmare when he unknowingly swallowed two metal pins hidden in chocolate decorations on his cake. The pins, used as scaffolding by the bakery, were lodged in his small intestine, causing 48 hours of terror for his family before passing naturally. The incident highlights the dangers of hidden objects in children's food.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Full schedule, fixtures, groups, India timings, venues, knockout dates
description: The road to FIFA World Cup 2026 is finally here. With 48 teams, 104 matches and a month of football across the United States, Canada and Mexico, the tournament promises history at every turn. Find everything you need in one place, from the full schedule, fixtures and group-stage matches to India match timings (IST), format changes, venues, knockout dates and must-watch clashes in the biggest World Cup ever.

title: Channing Tatum’s quote of the day celebrates hard work, grit and perseverance
description: Channing Tatum's journey through Hollywood is a testament to relentless dedication, a mindset he showcased even in high school. He upholds the idea that real achievement comes from pouring one's heart and soul into every endeavor, be it a steamy dance number in 'Magic Mike' or an adrenaline-fueled action sequence. This unwavering work ethic is what fuels his sustained acclaim.
